messages.content:
Bare or full infinitive?
The Jamesons can't afford Ответ Вопрос 2(invest) such a great amount!
The bare infinitive form "to invest" should be used in this sentence.

Fill in the infinitive in the correct form:
The report is Ответ Вопрос 3 (to hand in) first thing tomorrow morning
The report is to be handed in first thing tomorrow morning.

Fill in the infinitive in the correct form:
I can't believe that you really mean what you are saying. You mustОтвет Вопрос 4 (to kid)!
I can't believe that you really mean what you are saying. You must be kidding!

Complete the sentence in English:
'Не можем не  принять' - use the verb 'to accept '
We Ответ Вопрос 5 such favorable conditions.
We cannot help but accept such favorable conditions.

Insert the appropriate words equivalent to the Russian phrase ЛУЧШЕ ОБЪЯСНИТЬ:
I Ответ Вопрос 6 that I was a frequent visitor to the headmaster’s study.
I had better explain that I was a frequent visitor to the headmaster's study.

Insert the appropriate form of the verb in brackets:
It made her Ответ Вопрос 7 (to feel) like an explorer, a discoverer.
It made her feel like an explorer, a discoverer.
The Bensons are enjoying themselves at the seaside now. Actually, they are lucky Ответ Вопрос 8 such good weather.
The Bensons are enjoying themselves at the seaside now. Actually, they are lucky to have such good weather.

Bare or full infinitive?
He's always making me ____ (do) things the way he likes. It's so annoying.
In this sentence, the bare infinitive "do" should be used.
I am sorry not Ответ Вопрос 11 (iron) your suit. I completely forgot about it.
I am sorry not to have ironed your suit. I completely forgot about it.
Nick is so upset. He's sure he could  Ответ Вопрос 12 (write) the composition much better.
Nick is so upset. He's sure he could have written the composition much better.

Which form of the infinitive?
Let me finish, please. I don't like Ответ Вопрос 13 (interrupt).
In this sentence, the bare infinitive "interrupt" should be used.
It is understood that the escaped prisoner might Ответ Вопрос 14 (to hide) in a friend's house for the last month.
In this sentence, the full infinitive "to hide" should be used.

Which form of the infinitive?
Ответ Вопрос 15 (treat) by such an experienced doctor was a great advantage.
In this sentence, the bare infinitive "treated" should be used.

Which form of the infinitive?
Jess is really pleased Ответ Вопрос 16 (appoint) to the position of sales manager.
In this sentence, the bare infinitive "to be appointed" should be used.

Which form of the infinitive?
I can't find Lizzy. She appears Ответ Вопрос 17(leave).
In this sentence, the bare infinitive "to have left" should be used.

Complex Subject: write the correct form of the infinitive
I saw Amy last night. She seems Ответ Вопрос 18 (get) better now.

In this sentence, the bare infinitive "to be getting" should be used.

Corrected sentence: I saw Amy last night. She seems to be getting better now.

Bare or full infinitive?
The hostess tried to have them Ответ Вопрос 19(stay) longer.
In this sentence, the bare infinitive "stay" should be used.

Select the verb form that will complete the sentence correctly.
Susan hoped ________ to Terry’s party.
Вопрос 20 Выберите один ответ:

a.
she will be invited

b.
being invited

c.
to be invited

d.
for being invited

The correct answer is c. to be invited.
Susan hoped to be invited to Terry’s party.
